scripts.build: esbuild tools/boxplot.tsx tools/bargraph.tsx tools/scatter.tsx tools/aequorin.tsx tools/venn.tsx tools/molarity.tsx tools/power.tsx --outdir=tools --jsx=transform --minify --sourcemap
scripts.watch: esbuild tools/boxplot.tsx tools/bargraph.tsx tools/scatter.tsx tools/aequorin.tsx tools/venn.tsx tools/molarity.tsx tools/power.tsx --outdir=tools --jsx=transform --minify --sourcemap --watch
scripts.test: node tests/shared.test.js && node tests/parsing.test.js && node tests/integration.test.js && node tests/components.test.js && node tests/power.test.js
